steps.ttsScript: Many big English words come from Greek and Latin roots.
Knowing roots unlocks tons of vocabulary!
Like Bio, Photo, Geo, and Aqua — let us meet them!

slides.heading: Roots From Long Ago
slides.imagePrompt: A cheerful cartoon scroll with Greek and Latin letters. Clean pastel background. Bright 2D cartoon illustration, bold clean outlines, vibrant saturated colors. No text, no words, no letters. No twinkles or. No text overlays, no hallucinated words, no signs with writing. Natural-looking eyes, no AI-generated glints. No twinkles or sparkles in characters' eyes. No text overlays, no hallucinated words, no signs with writing. Natural-looking eyes, no AI-generated glints.

steps.ttsScript: Bio means life.
Photo means light.
Tele means far.
Phone means sound.

slides.heading: Common Roots
slides.imagePrompt: A cheerful cartoon root system with labels glowing. Clean pastel background. Bright 2D cartoon illustration, bold clean outlines, vibrant saturated colors. No text, no words, no letters. No twinkles or. No text overlays, no hallucinated words, no signs with writing. Natural-looking eyes, no AI-generated glints. No twinkles or sparkles in characters' eyes. No text overlays, no hallucinated words, no signs with writing. Natural-looking eyes, no AI-generated glints.

steps.ttsScript: Aqua means water. Aquarium = water place.
Geo means earth. Geography = writing about earth.
Chrono means time. Chronicle is a record of time.

slides.heading: Aqua, Geo, Chrono
slides.imagePrompt: A cheerful cartoon water droplet and earth globe characters. Clean pastel background. Bright 2D cartoon illustration, bold clean outlines, vibrant saturated colors. No text, no words, no letters. No twinkles or. No text overlays, no hallucinated words, no signs with writing. Natural-looking eyes, no AI-generated glints. No twinkles or sparkles in characters' eyes. No text overlays, no hallucinated words, no signs with writing. Natural-looking eyes, no AI-generated glints.

steps.ttsScript: Let's try one together. Here's a word.
Here is the word: biography.
What is the root? BIO!
What does it mean? Life!
So biography means writing about a life. You unlocked the word!

slides.heading: Let's Try One
slides.imagePrompt: A cheerful cartoon kid sitting cross-legged reading an open book, smiling. A small portrait of a person is shown on the book's cover page. Solid sky-blue background. NO horizontal stripes, NO rainbow, NO pastel gradient bands. Bright 2D cartoon illustration, bold clean outlines, vibrant saturated colors. No text, no words, no letters. Natural-looking eyes, no AI-generated glints.

steps.ttsScript: Here is a helpful trick.
One root unlocks many words. Aqua: aquarium, aquatic, aqueduct!
Roots unlocked!

slides.heading: Learn Roots, Win Big
slides.imagePrompt: A cheerful cartoon tree with a large root system visible underground, glowing softly. Each root branches into smaller roots — a clear visual metaphor for one root unlocking many words. Solid warm-amber background above the soil line. NO horizontal stripes, NO rainbow, NO pastel gradient bands. Bright 2D cartoon illustration, bold clean outlines, vibrant saturated colors. No text, no words, no letters. Natural-looking eyes, no AI-generated glints.

steps.ttsScript: You can unlock big words now — match each root to its meaning.

interactive.prompt: Match each root to its meaning
interactive.hint: Bio means life, tele means far, aqua means water.
interactive.correctScript: You matched them all! Bio is life, tele is far, and aqua is water. You unlocked them!
interactive.wrongScript: Almost — think about what each root means. Try again!

steps.ttsScript: Time to try it.
Now it's your turn! You'll spot roots in real words all by yourself. I know you can do it. Let's go!
steps.interaction: A 'Let's Go!' button pulses, inviting the kid to tap and start the MCQs.

slides.heading: Time to Practice!
slides.imagePrompt: An excited cartoon child jumping with arms raised in celebration, surrounded by gold stars and colorful confetti. Bright 2D cartoon illustration, bold clean outlines, vibrant saturated colors. No text, no words, no letters. Natural-looking eyes, no AI-generated glints.
